description:
Adds Threads (com.instagram.barcelona 434.0.0.41.74): Hide ads (sponsored + injected netego feed units), Remove AD_ID permission, Change app name / package name (Threads Morphe / com.instagram.barcelona.morphe). All on by default. Plus existing SonyLIV and Nutrilio patches.

Verified: morphe-cli applies all four Threads patches; runtime/login not device-verified. Pinned to 434.0.0.41.74.
